00013 int test_main(int, char**)
00014 {
00015   Program pgm;
00016   std::cout << setprogram(pgm);
00017 
00018   NodePtr a = Node::create<INT>(1);
00019   NodePtr b = Node::create<INT>(2);
00020   NodePtr goal = Node::create<OPER>(OP_INT_ADD, a, b);
00021 
00022   std::cout << *goal << std::endl;
00023   execute(pgm, *goal);
00024 
00025   std::cout << *goal << std::endl;
00026 
00027   goal = Node::create<FAIL>();
00028   std::cout << *goal << std::endl;
00029   // BOOST_CHECK(*goal == 3);
00030 
00031   return 0;
00032 }
